case_title: CCSF-OFFICE OF THE TREASURER-TAX COLLECTOR VS. SALCEDO GIOVANNI

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,811.00 FILED BY CCSF-OFFICE OF THE TREASURER-TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT GIOVANNI, SALCEDO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-27-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-27-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CCSF-OFFICE OF THE TREASURER-TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GIOVANNI, SALCEDO $1,811.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,876.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
